rationale: Tests if rapid multi-month liquidations in margin debt reliably flag ultimate macro capitulation floors.
expected_failure_mode: Margin debt can keep unwinding or plateau at depressed levels for years after a structural bubble burst.
stop_conditions: hybrid candidate fails Gold all-era economics or Future Confidence
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
The strategy enters more than 30% above the eventual cyclical bear-market bottom.
Out-of-sample Sharpe ratio drops below 0.35 over a 10-year cycle.
